meta.title: Secondary metabolites from endophytic Streptomyces aureofaciens CMUAc130 and their antifungal activity

bodyHtml:
Microbiology (2005), 151, 1691–1695 ARTICLE.

RETRACTION

The results and conclusions reported in this paper, which was accepted for publication on 11 February 2005, are substantively the same as those reported in a paper by the same authors published in Annals of Microbiology (Taechowisan et al., 2005), accepted for publication on 14 January 2005. The authors agree that the slight differences do not justify the publication of this second paper, and they acknowledge that this paper would not have been accepted for publication in Microbiology if the Editors had been aware of this earlier submission; this paper is therefore retracted.
referencesHtml: 1. Taechowisan, T., Lu, C., Shen, Y. & Lumyong, S. (2005). 4-Arylcoumarins from endophytic Streptomyces aureofaciens CMUAc130 and their antifungal activity. Ann Microbiol 55, 63–66.
